tasks.title: Bootstrap tracker reference audit
tasks.description: Audit all cost_tracker, CostTracker, add(), token_tracking, TokenTracker, and record_call references before production edits.
acceptance_criteria: Audit includes implementation, tests, and string monkeypatch references.
AGENTS.md board pointer matches verified Fizzy board 03fw5alxw15iqwh6hq15vfdsb.

tasks.title: Introduce fresh_tracker fixture and migrate tests
tasks.description: Add an opt-in fresh_tracker fixture and replace direct tracker method monkeypatches in affected tests.
acceptance_criteria: Direct monkeypatches of cost_tracker.add are removed.

tasks.title: Hard rename CostTracker to TokenTracker
tasks.description: Create token_tracking.py, move tracker implementation, rename add() to record_call(), and preserve read-side fields.
acceptance_criteria: record_call replaces add for token tracking.
total_cost, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, by_model, and summary() remain available.

tasks.title: Move gauntlet tracking to model_dispatch.call_model
tasks.description: Remove tracker imports from gauntlet phase files and record successful gauntlet model usage in model_dispatch.call_model().
acceptance_criteria: No gauntlet phase file imports a tracker singleton.
Successful call_model responses record usage once.

tasks.title: Verify and capture concern status

Session/spec artifacts identify CON-001 as out-of-scope drift.
